approach.text: A cluster of tarps and rusted shelving marks the {{market_name}}. Survivors eye you from behind stacked crates as you step inside. The smell of smoked meat and old machine oil hangs heavy in the air.

choices.label: Ask the keeper for what you need.

browsing.text: The keeper gestures to a back corner where salvage is piled under a canvas sheet. You find food rations and a handful of scrap worth trading. The crowd thins and the keeper watches you less carefully now.

choices.label: Press the keeper about the back room.

back_room.text: Behind a hanging tarp, shelves hold pre-war medical supplies and sealed canisters of fuel. The keeper gives you a long look and names a fair price for what you can carry. You leave with more than you came for.

pickpocket.text: A child bumps your arm and vanishes into the crowd. A ration pack is missing from your belt.

bad_deal.text: The keeper palms your water and shrugs — the goods are damaged and worthless. You don't get it back.

guard_confrontation.text: A guard blocks the doorway and shoves you hard into the shelving. You stumble out into the street, empty-handed and bruised.
